explicitForbiddenDuplication: Do not implement a HoloScript parser in HoloLand; delegate parse to @holoscript/mcp-server or @holoscript/core.
Do not implement HoloScript validation or diagnostics in HoloLand; delegate validate and diagnostics to HoloScript tools.
Do not implement HoloScript compiler targets in HoloLand; delegate compile to HoloScript tools.
Do not define canonical HoloScript trait registries in HoloLand; consume upstream trait definitions.
Do not own HoloScript graph understanding in HoloLand; delegate graph and Absorb code intelligence to HoloScript MCP.

requiredFamilies.description: Build and assemble HoloLand-specific assets, scenes, zones, and creator-authored world material from trusted HoloScript source.
Operate live worlds and shards with explicit action receipts.
Publish and validate Frontier MMO gameplay units.
Create real-world anchors and AR overlays with privacy receipts.
Register and coordinate robot and AI actors in Twin Earth with capability, permission, and safety checks.
Review, publish, remix, and measure creator-facing HoloLand content.
Let agents steward live HoloLand spaces through receipted, reversible actions.
Preserve Brittney lineage across guides, NPCs, item arcs, and runtime stewards without binding it to one cloud endpoint.
Capture cross-MCP evidence that HoloScript source validation led to a HoloLand runtime action.
Prove HoloLand renders and behaves on browser, desktop, mobile, VR, AR, and local hardware surfaces.
Admit HoloScript-looking artifacts only after conformance, provenance, sandbox, permission, and world-write gates pass.

crossMcpReceiptEnvelope.mutatingToolRequirement: Every HoloLand tool that mutates world, shard, player, creator, robot, AI, sensor, actuator, or runtime state must emit this envelope or a stricter successor.

mcp_get_info.reason: MCP service metadata stays as a standard service inspection tool.

mcp_get_health.reason: Health status is service evidence and does not duplicate HoloScript.

mcp_get_capabilities.reason: Capability introspection is required for Orchestrator registration and agent routing.

mcp_get_audit_log.reason: Existing audit log queries remain useful as evidence until receipts supersede them.

brittney_get_browser_state.reason: Live browser state is HoloLand product runtime truth.

brittney_list_scenes.reason: Scene inventory is HoloLand runtime visibility.

brittney_inspect_component.reason: Component inspection observes the running HoloLand surface.

brittney_get_profiler_stats.reason: FPS and frame evidence belong to HoloLand's lived product surface.

brittney_get_console_logs.reason: Runtime logs support product QA and hardware validation.

brittney_get_runtime_errors.reason: Runtime errors are HoloLand evidence, not source-language diagnostics.

brittney_take_screenshot.reason: Screenshots are surface evidence for browser and headset validation.

brittney_explain_error.reason: Read-only runtime explanation can remain a Brittney product operation.

brittney_suggest_fix.reason: Read-only fix suggestions remain useful when source changes still route through HoloScript validation.

brittney_ask_question.reason: Question answering over live HoloLand context is a product feature.

brittney_analyze_performance.reason: Performance analysis is tied to the running HoloLand surface.

brittney_search_holohub.reason: HoloHub search is creator/product inventory, not HoloScript substrate.

brittney_check_service.reason: Brittney service checks are runtime availability evidence.

brittney_get_live_state.reason: Live app state belongs to HoloLand world truth.

brittney_quick_status.reason: Single-call product status is useful for agents and does not own source semantics.

create_world.reason: World creation must name shard/source trust and emit a receipt.

execute_holoscript.reason: Raw execution should become a source-validated zone or shard update.

visualize_data.reason: Visualization should be expressed as a world assembly action from trusted source.

invite_agent.reason: Agent access should bind identity, permissions, and receipt metadata.

get_world.reason: World reads should converge on shard-aware naming.

list_worlds.reason: World lists should become shard/world inventory.

update_world.reason: World updates should identify the source artifact and runtime receipt.

delete_world.reason: Destructive deletion needs shard lifecycle naming and rollback policy.

add_object.reason: Object insertion should be asset-building from source, not ad hoc geometry mutation.

remove_object.reason: Object removal should be a receipted zone update.

list_objects.reason: Object inventory should become a state snapshot with provenance.

brittney_create_smart_asset.reason: Smart assets are product assets that must carry source and validation receipts.

brittney_reload_scene.reason: Reloading a runtime adapter should be sandboxed and receipted.

brittney_navigate_to_world.reason: Navigation should be part of a surface validation flow.

brittney_create_and_inject.reason: One-shot creation must split source generation, HoloScript validation, and HoloLand runtime receipt.

brittney_create_and_deploy.reason: Deploy should become a receipted zone or shard publish action.

index_spatial_object.reason: Spatial indexing should live under Twin Earth operational graph semantics.

query_spatial.reason: Spatial reads should become Twin Earth operational graph queries.

semantic_spatial_query.reason: Semantic spatial queries belong to the HoloLand operational graph once source semantics are upstream.

verify_accessibility_semantics.reason: Accessibility semantics should be checked as surface validation while language rules stay upstream.

parse_holoscript.reason: HoloLand must not own HoloScript parsing.

validate_holoscript.reason: HoloLand must not own HoloScript validation.

get_holoscript_examples.reason: Language examples belong to the source layer.

brittney_generate_holoscript.reason: Source generation is HoloScript substrate; HoloLand may consume the result.

brittney_get_wisdom_stats.reason: Knowledge statistics are coordination truth, not HoloLand world truth.

brittney_export_wisdom.reason: Wisdom export should use the shared knowledge pipeline.

brittney_compress_session.reason: Session compression belongs to team knowledge unless it becomes NPC memory with a HoloLand receipt.

brittney_holoscript_playground.reason: Interactive HoloScript language behavior belongs upstream.

brittney_holoscript_diff.reason: HoloScript source diff semantics should be owned upstream.

brittney_learn_holoscript.reason: Learning the language should route to source docs and tools.

holo_parse_to_graph.reason: Graph understanding has already moved to HoloScript MCP.

holo_visualize_flow.reason: Graph visualization has already moved to HoloScript MCP.

holo_get_node_connections.reason: Node connection analysis is HoloScript graph truth.

holo_design_graph.reason: Graph design belongs to HoloScript tooling.

holo_diff_graphs.reason: Graph diffing belongs to HoloScript tooling.

holo_suggest_connections.reason: Graph suggestions belong to HoloScript tooling.

brittney_scan_project.reason: IDE project scanning is HoloScript developer tooling.

brittney_code_action.reason: Code actions belong to HoloScript MCP.

brittney_hover.reason: Hover semantics belong to the language source layer.

brittney_workspace_summary.reason: Workspace summaries are coordination/codebase truth, not live-world truth.

brittney_diff_and_merge.reason: Source merge semantics should not be a HoloLand runtime tool.

store_memory.reason: Generic memory storage belongs to the shared knowledge layer.

recall_similar.reason: Generic recall belongs to the shared knowledge layer.

query_rag_knowledge.reason: Generic RAG knowledge belongs to the shared knowledge layer.

load_skill.reason: Generic skill loading is a coordination concern.

extract_scene_graph_labels.reason: Source scene graph labels belong to HoloScript graph understanding.

brittney_execute_in_browser.deprecationReason: Raw browser execution is too broad for sovereign agent exposure without sandbox and receipt boundaries.

brittney_auto_fix.deprecationReason: Automatic live fixes must split suggestion, source validation, world-write authority, and receipt emission.

brittney_batch_execute.deprecationReason: Batch execution must be replaced by per-action receipt fan-out.

brittney_smart_fix_all.deprecationReason: Bulk autofix behavior is not acceptable without source-level validation and live-world admission gates.

brittney_iterate_until_done.deprecationReason: Open-ended autonomous loops need bounded steward ticks and receipts.

execute_skill.deprecationReason: Generic skill execution should not be exposed through HoloLand world tooling.

brittney_error_monitor.testRequirement: Prove monitor start, event capture, timeout, and receipt emission on a local browser target.

brittney_performance_monitor.testRequirement: Prove threshold behavior and sampled FPS/frame-time evidence on local hardware.

brittney_scene_snapshot.testRequirement: Prove deterministic snapshot shape and artifact hashing.

brittney_compare_snapshots.testRequirement: Prove stable diff output across saved snapshot fixtures.

brittney_record_session.testRequirement: Prove recording start/stop and replay metadata are written as receipts.

brittney_test_scene.testRequirement: Prove scene test failure and success paths with local HoloLand fixtures.

brittney_accessibility_check.testRequirement: Prove accessibility findings map to source artifacts and surface evidence.

brittney_explain_scene.testRequirement: Prove explanation cites live scene evidence and does not invent source semantics.

brittney_full_audit.testRequirement: Prove audit output includes browser, HoloScript validation, and receipt coverage.

brittney_explain_everything.testRequirement: Prove broad explanations cite concrete runtime, source, and receipt evidence.

brittney_perceive_scene.testRequirement: Prove perception output is deterministic enough for agent use and labels evidence source.

generate_spatial_dataset.testRequirement: Prove dataset rows carry HoloScript source, world, and actor provenance.

replay_episodic_timeline.testRequirement: Prove replay reads receipts and cannot mutate live state.
